comment: Machine-readable game file installation instructions for PortMaster ports. Each port maps store availability + compatibility and per-source file copy instructions. Compatibility values: 'compatible', 'incompatible', 'unverified', 'not_available'. File instruction 'fromStore' may be a store key or 'any'. Action values: 'copy_all', 'copy_dir', 'copy_file', 'place_installer' (place file in dest, port extracts on first run).

itch.note: Download the Linux zip. Contains Celeste.exe + Content/ folder — copy all into celeste/gamedata/.

epic.note: Windows build works. Use Steam depot download if on Linux: app 504230, need Windows depot.

steam.incompatibleReason: Steam version has DRM; copying files out of the Steam installation does not work for this port.

humble.incompatibleReason: Humble Bundle sells a Steam key only, not a DRM-free download.

fileInstructions.description: Extract the downloaded Celeste Linux zip and copy all contents (including Celeste.exe and Content/) into celeste/gamedata/.

steps.description: Copy extracted Linux zip contents to celeste/gamedata/

fileInstructions.description: Copy all game files from the Epic Windows install into celeste/gamedata/.

steps.description: Copy all Celeste Windows files to celeste/gamedata/

gog.note: Must use the original Braid, not the Anniversary Edition. GOG sells the original Linux .sh installer.

humble.note: Humble Bundle sells the original DRM-free Linux .sh installer (not the Anniversary Edition).

steam.incompatibleReason: Neither Steam version works with this port. The original (app 26800) is Windows-only on Steam. The Anniversary Edition (app 499180) uses a different engine. The port needs the original Linux game from GOG or Humble Bundle.

fileInstructions.description: Place the GOG Linux .sh installer file (e.g. braid_en_linux_*.sh) in ports/braid/gamedata/. The port extracts it on first run.

steps.description: Place the GOG Linux installer .sh in braid/gamedata/

fileInstructions.description: Place the Humble Linux .sh installer file in ports/braid/gamedata/. Same format as GOG.

steps.description: Place the Humble Linux installer .sh in braid/gamedata/

gog.note: Version 1.2.0.3 specifically required. In GOG Galaxy: More > Manage Installation > Configure > Uncheck auto-updates > Show more versions > Select 1.2.0.3. Newer versions have not been tested and may break.

steam.incompatibleReason: The Steam version of Blazing Beaks is not compatible with this port. Only GOG version 1.2.0.3 is confirmed to work.

itch.incompatibleReason: This port requires GOG version 1.2.0.3. The itch.io version is not compatible.

fileInstructions.description: Copy all game files from the GOG Blazing Beaks installation (v1.2.0.3) to ports/blazingbeaks/assets/.

steps.description: Copy all v1.2.0.3 game files to blazingbeaks/assets/

gog.note: GOG offline installer (2 files: setup_arx_fatalis*.exe + matching .bin) can be placed directly in arx/gamedata/ and will be extracted on first run. Alternatively extract with innoextract and copy data.pak + surrounding files.

steam.note: Steam version (Windows files) works. Copy data.pak and surrounding files/folders into arx/gamedata/.

fileInstructions.description: Option A (installer): Place both GOG installer files (setup_arx_fatalis*.exe and matching .bin) in arx/gamedata/ — the port extracts on first run. Option B (extracted): Copy data.pak and all surrounding files/folders into arx/gamedata/.

steps.description: Place GOG installer .exe in arx/gamedata/
Place matching GOG installer .bin in arx/gamedata/

fileInstructions.description: Copy data.pak and all surrounding files and directories from the Steam Arx Fatalis install into arx/gamedata/.

steps.description: Copy all Steam Arx Fatalis files (including data.pak) to arx/gamedata/

steam.note: Game of the Year Edition required.

gog.note: GOG offline installer (2 files) can be placed in openmw/data/ and the port installs on first run. Alternatively install on PC and copy Data Files/.

fileInstructions.description: Option A (installer): Place the two GOG offline installer files in ports/openmw/data/ — the port installs on first launch. Option B (extracted): Copy the Data Files/ directory from the GOG installation.

steps.description: Place GOG installer .exe in openmw/data/
Place matching GOG installer .bin in openmw/data/

gog.note: Use the Linux version installer. If already installed on PC, copy res.pak and hlboot.dat from the game/ folder.

fileInstructions.description: Download the specific Linux depot (manifest 5814907161645516281) via Steam console, then copy res.pak and hlboot.dat. On Linux: downloaded to ~/.steam/steam/ubuntu12_32/steamapps/content/app_588650/depot_588653/

Copy hlboot.dat from downloaded depot
